channel.title: LEXORD® Engineering · Premium Custom PS5 Controller & Zubehör
channel.description: Custom PS5 Controller, Reparatur-Service, 3D-Print Atelier-Kollektion. Made in Germany.

item.title: LXRD Performance Black — Custom PS5 Controller
item.description: Premium Custom PS5 Controller mit TMR-Sticks, Clicky-Trigger, GRIP-Gehäuse, 2x Paddles. Handmontiert in Domsühl.
item.g:google_product_category: Electronics > Video Games > Video Game Accessories > Game Controllers

item.title: LXRD Plus Black — Hall Effect Controller
item.description: Custom PS5 Controller mit Hall Effect Sticks (driftfrei), Clicky-Trigger, 2x Paddles.
item.g:google_product_category: Electronics > Video Games > Video Game Accessories > Game Controllers

item.title: LXRD Basic Black — Einsteiger Custom Controller
item.description: Einsteiger Custom PS5 Controller mit 2x Paddles. Perfekt für Pro-Gamer mit kleinem Budget.
item.g:google_product_category: Electronics > Video Games > Video Game Accessories > Game Controllers

item.title: LXRD Elite Pro — Top-Tier Controller
item.description: Top-Tier Controller: TMR Pro Sticks, Carbon Look, 4x Paddles, RGB, optionale Gravur.
item.g:google_product_category: Electronics > Video Games > Video Game Accessories > Game Controllers

item.title: LXRD Stealth Edition — Matt-Finish Limited
item.description: Limited Edition mit Hall Effect Sticks, Matt-Finish, Premium-Verarbeitung.
item.g:google_product_category: Electronics > Video Games > Video Game Accessories > Game Controllers

item.title: LXRD Wallet — 3D-Druck Premium Portemonnaie
item.description: Limited Edition 3D-gedrucktes Portemonnaie aus Bio-PETG. RFID-Safe, Magnet-Lock.
item.g:google_product_category: Apparel & Accessories > Handbags, Wallets & Cases > Wallets & Money Clips

item.title: Stick-Drift Reparatur · LEXORD Service
item.description: Professionelle Stick-Drift Reparatur ab 25 €. PS5, PS4, Xbox, Switch. 6 Monate Garantie.
item.g:google_product_category: Business & Industrial > Work Safety Protective Gear
